fields.description:
## Why
Independent verification is the precision gate (Chain-of-Verification / SAFE); it filters Pass-1 false
positives without rubber-stamping.

## What
- ONE aggregate call over all findings on a NON-FRONTIER model; per finding -> severity ATTRIBUTES
  {prod_impact, debt_impact, blast_radius, likelihood, reversibility} + typed BINARY sub-answers
  {yes|no|insufficient}.
- Skepticism aimed at the FINDING via charitable plan-reading (the finding stands only if it holds under the
  plan's most reasonable reading = evidence-entailment); atomic, independent, verdict-with-citation, allow insufficient.

## Scope
- Text verification over plan + findings; code-citation findings are rare in plan review (grounding owned by
  E4/G1G2/A1 per the agent-vs-single-turn bright line).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Single aggregate verify call per review on a non-frontier model.
- [ ] Binary sub-question set + severity attributes per finding; independence rules in the prompt.
- [ ] Charitable-plan-reading / entailment precision gate implemented.
- [ ] PROVING CHECK that Pass-2 DISCRIMINATES (not rubber-stamps): a labeled set of {true finding, planted FALSE finding} where Pass-2 must return no/insufficient or LOWER confidence on the false ones while leaving true findings standing (independence holds; charitable-reading filters Pass-1 FPs without suppressing real findings) — wired into the `7284` eval suite as Pass-2's OWN cases, distinct from the per-criterion prompt cases.
